flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Independence Community College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (53.7% → 43.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Independence Community College rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.2k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Independence Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (34.3% vs 39.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Independence Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).
